executions/recipe/work/ecs/calculate/ecs.long_name: Equilibrium Climate Sensitivity (Gregory method) for multiple climate models.

dimensions.statistic: global annual mean anomaly of rtnt vs tas

executions/recipe/work/ecs/calculate/ecs.long_name: Global annual mean top of the atmosphere (TOA) net radiation flux anomaly N vs. global annual mean near-surface air temperature anomaly ΔT for 150 years (blue circles) of the abrupt 4x CO2 experiment for model CanESM5 (ensemble member r1i1p1f1). Anomalies are calculated relative to a pre-industrial control simulation of the same model. The solid black line corresponds to an ordinary linear regression between N and ΔT. On the top left, R2 corresponds to the coefficient of determination of the linear regression. The equilibrium climate sensitivity (ECS) is estimated as the x-intercept of the linear regression (interception of the solid and dashed black lines) divided by 2.

executions/recipe/work/ecs/calculate/lam.long_name: Climate Feedback Parameter for multiple climate models.
